Off Calendar Dec-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael C. Serveria, Esq., from Rankin, Landsness, Lahde, Serverian & Stock, 408-293-0463
Sze-Han Lo, J.D., SHL Law Group, 415-831-3388, for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHANG WEI LIU'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT WITH LEAVE TO DEFEND is Granted (CCP 473(d).) good cause found. The defect in the proof of service of the statement of damages is prejudicial to the defendant. Answer to be filed by 12/30/11. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla Miller, Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANT CHANG LIU'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED TO 12/21/11 PER E-MAIL TO THE COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: John K. Stewart, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2542.

Sze-Hang Lo, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Yuen Sze Levina Leung, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Chang Wei Liu.
Default was entered against defendant on March 10, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, June 1, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Yuen Sze Levina Leung, and against the Defaulted Defendant Chang Wei Liu as follows:

Damages/Principal - $29,892.27.
Costs - $425.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $30,317.27.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
